name: can-diag
description: CAN bus diagnostics via NDR — v3 with correct devctl codes (class=5, cmd=7/8 from NavigationNdrInfo disassembly). Probes devctl format, scans ~25 ECU module addresses, reads fault codes, module info, and live sensor data. Grabs NDR/taco/HFS binaries for analysis. READ-ONLY — no writes to vehicle systems.
author: dspl1236

scripts.can_diag.sh: Full 5-phase diagnostic: probe, scan, identify, DTC, summary
scripts.scan_modules.sh: Quick module scanner — run from telnet interactively
scripts.read_dtc.sh: Read fault codes from a specific module
scripts.read_module_info.sh: Read part numbers, SW/HW versions from a module
scripts.read_live_data.sh: Read live sensor data (RPM, temp, speed, oil) from DME or cluster
scripts.grab_binaries.sh: Extract key binaries from car for offline analysis
